ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the patient is from */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "fever" REAL /* Body temperature of the patient */,
  "bodypain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has body pain */,
  "runny_nose" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has a runny nose */,
  "difficulty_breathing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has difficulty breathing */,
  "nasal_congestion" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has nasal congestion */,
  "sore_throat" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has a sore throat */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the patient's condition (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "contact_with_covid_patient" TEXT /* Whether the patient has been in contact with a COVID-19 patient */,
  "infected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient is infected with COVID-19 */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's residential address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Patient's occupation */,
  "smoking_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient smokes */,
  "alcohol_consumption" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient consumes alcohol */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Text field for any recent travel history */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date of the last COVID-19 test */,
  "last_test_result" TEXT /* Result of the last COVID-19 test */,
  "hospitalization_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient is currently hospitalized */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the country's health department */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "health_ministry_website" TEXT /* URL of the country's health ministry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "vaccination_site" TEXT /* Location where the vaccination was administered */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who administered the vaccine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccination record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccination record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_vaccinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_comorbidities" (
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comorbidity record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the comorbidity */,
  "comorbidity_type" TEXT /* Type of comorbidity (e.g., Diabetes, Hypertension) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of treatment (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who diagnosed the comorbidity */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comorbidity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comorbidity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comorbidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_comorbidities_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the medical event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of medical event (e.g., Hospitalization, Outpatient visit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical event */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the treatment received during the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date of contact */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., Phone call, In-person visit) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the contact (e.g., Follow-up, No action) */,
  "contact_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the contact */,
  "contact_location" TEXT /* Location where the contact occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_contacts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was prescribed */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., Antiviral, Antibiotic) */,
  "prescriber" TEXT /* Name of the prescriber */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the treatment */,
  "treatment_location" TEXT /* Location where the treatment was administered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date the symptom was observed */,
  "symptom_type" TEXT /* Type of symptom (e.g., Fever, Cough) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the symptom (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "symptom_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the symptom */,
  "symptom_location" TEXT /* Location where the symptom was observed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symptom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symptom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, Antigen) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory conducting the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
